title: Position: Evaluating Bias in AI Agents Is (Still) a Social Science Measurement Challenge
authors: with Soubhik Barari and Diwas Bhattarai
venue: ACL 2026 Workshop on Evaluating AI in Practice
status_label: Forthcoming, ACL 2026 Workshop on Evaluating AI in Practice
citation_conference_title: ACL 2026 Workshop on Evaluating AI in Practice
summary: Argues that bias evaluation for AI agents remains a social-science measurement problem, requiring clear constructs, valid operationalization, and attention to delegation as a source of bias.
